raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation of an integrated emotional-cognitive stance",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "love/joy and discernment are compatible without trade-off",
    "openness can be maintained without forcing positivity",
    "warmth and clarity are not mutually exclusive",
    "connection and truth can be pursued simultaneously",
    "authentic joy arises from internal coherence rather than external performance"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; consistently frames apparent opposites as integrable",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the distinctions drawn map onto achievable psychological states and the speaker benefits from the framing",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the claimed integration is illusory or used to mask unresolved conflict or suppressed negativity"
}
